arts.ttl: Opinion: Why Enzo Maresca needs to put Cole Palmer back on the right
arts.sum: I believe we could solve two issues in one move here, simply by putting Cole Palmer back on the right. Admittedly, I have been against doing this for a while, simply because I believe Palmer playing centrally is very effective when he is on form. But as we have spoken about so often, putting him […]

arts.ttl: Chelsea exclusive: Club legend Pat Nevin comments on Champions League ambitions, highlights "biggest problem"
arts.sum: Chelsea legend Pat Nevin tells Sports Mole that "it is vital" for the Blues to qualify for next season's Champions League, as well as highlighting their potential biggest issue.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Bournemouth – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome Bournemouth to West London tonight as they search for their first league victory of 2025. Both sides booked their place in the fourth round of the FA Cup last weekend with comfortable victories. Chelsea put five past Morecambe without reply at Stamford Bridge, while Bournemouth overturned an early deficit to beat West Brom […] The post Chelsea vs Bournemouth – Match Preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
